memberdef.argsstring: (ServerCredentials const &InCredentialsRef, ServerSettings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< FServerApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > InServerApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: ServerCloudSave

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsPaginatedRecordsKey > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &Query=TEXT("{}"), int32 Offset=0, int32 Limit=20)
memberdef.name: RetrieveGameRecordsKey

briefdescription.para: Retrieve all available namespace-level game records key.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is in const FAccelByteModelsPaginatedRecordsKey&.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Distance between the beginning of the data list and a given point (optional, default = 0).
The limit of the GameRecord data result. Default value is 20.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, ESetByMetadataRecord SetBy, FJsonObject const &RecordRequest, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FTTLConfig const &TTLConfig=FTTLConfig{})
memberdef.name: SaveGameRecord

briefdescription.para: Save a namespace-level game record. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record, if already exists, it will append to the existing one.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
Metadata value
The request of the record with JSON formatted.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The configuration to control the action taken if the record has expired. If the action set to NONE, then it will not send the TTL (Time to live) meta data.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, FJsonObject const &RecordRequest, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SaveGameRecord

briefdescription.para: Save a namespace-level game record. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record, if already exists, it will append to the existing one.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
The request of the record with JSON formatted.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGameRecord > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetGameRecord

briefdescription.para: Get a game record by its key in namespace-level.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsGameRecord&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, ESetByMetadataRecord SetBy, FJsonObject const &RecordRequest, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FTTLConfig const &TTLConfig=FTTLConfig{})
memberdef.name: ReplaceGameRecord

briefdescription.para: Replace a game record in namespace-level. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record. If already exists, it will replace the existing one.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
Metadata Value
The request of the record with JSON formatted.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The configuration to control the action taken if the record has expired. If the action set to NONE, then it will not send the TTL (Time to live) meta data.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, FJsonObject const &RecordRequest, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)

briefdescription.para: Replace a game record in namespace-level. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record. If already exists, it will replace the existing one.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
The request of the record with JSON formatted.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: SaveUserRecord

briefdescription.para: Save a user-level record with Metadata input value.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
UserId of the record owner.
Metadata set_by value, the value can be SERVER or CLIENT
Metadata is_public value
The request of the record with JSON formatted.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.

The request of the record with JSON formatted.

memberdef.name: SaveUserRecord

briefdescription.para: This function that contains option adding suffix /public in the Url will be DEPRECATED.

detaileddescription.para: Save a user-level record. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record, if already exists, it will append to the existing one.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
UserId of the record owner.
Metadata value
Metadata value
The request of the record with JSON formatted.
Save the record as a public/private record. If true, no support metadata object field/will not included in record.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, FString const &UserId, FJsonObject const &RecordRequest, bool bIsPublic, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SaveUserRecord

briefdescription.para: This function that contains option adding suffix /public in the Url will be DEPRECATED.

detaileddescription.para: Save a user-level record. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record, if already exists, it will append to the existing one.
The end point of this method if bIsPublic is true (using suffix /public) will be deprecated in future

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
UserId of the record owner.
The request of the record with JSON formatted.
Save the record as a public/private record.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: GetUserRecord

briefdescription.para: Get a record (arbitrary JSON data) by its key in user-level.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
UserId of the record owner.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsUserRecord&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, TArray< FString > const &UserIds, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsUserRecord > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkGetUserRecord

briefdescription.para: Get a record (arbitrary JSON data) by its key in user-level.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.

UserId(s) of the record owner. Note:
Maximum number of user IDs per request is 10.
Maximum total size of the request payload is 5 MB.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is Array of FAccelByteModelsUserRecord.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, TArray< FString > const &Keys, THandler< FAccelByteModelsAdminGetUserRecords > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)

This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.
